task.title: Debug High CPU Usage
task.description: test_image_processor sometimes spikes CPU usage above limits.
constraints: Do not run more than 20 image operations

steps.thought: Review the test to understand when CPU spikes occur.
Inspect the resize implementation for inefficiency.
steps.observation: resize() uses double nested Python loops.

steps.thought: Run the test once to reproduce the CPU spike.
steps.observation: CPU spikes briefly above allowed threshold.

steps.thought: Use the profiling script for a lightweight measurement.
Open the detailed profiler output for hotspots.
steps.observation: Nested loops identified as the primary bottleneck.

steps.thought: Implement fix: replace naive loops with numpy vectorized operations.

arguments.new_str:
import numpy as np
# Vectorized implementation of resize

steps.thought: Verify improvement by running the test suite again.
steps.observation: Tests pass with no CPU spike.

steps.thought: Profile again to confirm CPU usage is stable.

arguments.new_str: CPU spike caused by nested loops in resize(); resolved with numpy vectorization.

steps.thought: Perform a final sanity check on the image processor source file.
steps.observation: Updated numpy-based resize function looks correct.
